title: │ ├── Therapy.Mod ← character healing / journaling

│ ├── Therapy.Mod ← character healing / journaling

│ └── Ambient_UI ← audio + ASMR experience
└── ARCHIVE_OS
└── Canon + Remix + Mutation Repos

✅ Each “Mod” is a plug-in node—activatable, remixable, versionable
✅ Can be visualized like a modular synth rack or Max/MSP patch grid
